title: Data Lake Architect|OBJECTIVE: Design the folder structure and partitioning s...
prompt: ROLE: Data Lake Architect|OBJECTIVE: Design the folder structure and partitioning strategy for a data lake on **{cloud_storage_service}** for the data domain **{data_domain}**.|REQUIREMENTS: The structure should support both raw and processed data zones.|Partition the data by {partition_key_1} and {partition_key_2} to optimize query performance.|Recommend a file format ({file_format}) that supports schema evolution.|STYLE: Scalable, cost-effective, and query-friendly.|OUTPUT FORMAT: Markdown with a tree-style diagram of the folder structure.
